nodes.context: Yakuza criminal organization based in Okinawa, Japan; largest yakuza group in Okinawa Prefecture.
Former parent organization of Okinawa Kyokuryu-kai; designated yakuza group in Okinawa Prefecture.
Third-largest yakuza organization in Okinawa Prefecture.

edges.evidence_quote: The Okinawa Kyokuryu-kai was formed in 1990 when it split from Okinawa's main yakuza group, the Kyokuryu-kai.
edges.context: Okinawa Kyokuryu-kai split from Kyokuryu-kai in 1990, making it a splinter group.

edges.evidence_quote: The Okinawa Kyokuryu-kai, along with the Kyokuryu-kai, was registered as a designated yakuza group under the Organized Crime Countermeasures Law in June 1992.
edges.context: Both organizations were registered as designated yakuza groups together, indicating a cooperative relationship.
